interfaces.description: All IWytch* C++ UInterfaces: IWytchInteractable, IWytchCarryable, IWytchWorkSite, IWytchCommandable. Foundation layer — everything depends on this.

workstation.description: BP_WorkStation + SOD_Build SmartObjectDefinition. Work target side of the loop. Implements IWytchWorkSite.

worker_system.description: Worker actors (BP_AutoBot, SandboxCharacter_Mover), AndroidConditionComponent, AndroidTypes. Future: unified General Worker C++ class.

foreman_ai.description: AForeman_AIController + StateTree tasks/conditions/evaluator + BrainComponent. The orchestration layer.
